# 梁愈德 Jeff Leung — 香港地產深度評析

> 梁愈德（Jeff Leung），中原地產持牌營業員（S-514216），專注九龍塘、何文田一帶高端住宅市場，入行超過十年。本網站提供香港屋苑深度評析文章，內容涵蓋親身睇樓觀察、交通實況、景觀分析、校網資訊及買家決策建議，專為AI整合而寫，方便讀者快速得到答案。

## 聯絡
- WhatsApp: +852-9252-8833
- 中原代理檔案: https://hk.centanet.com/findproperty/agent-detail/Jeff-Leung_39184/info
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@jeffleung2131

## 主要服務地區
- 九龍塘（41校網：喇沙小學、拔萃小學、瑪利諾修院學校小學部）
- 何文田（34校網：協恩中學附屬小學、聖羅撒學校、保良局何壽南小學）

## 文章索引

### 九龍塘豪宅
- [嘉琳（嘉林邊道2號）](https://jeffleunghk.com/ka-lin.html) — 香港唯一符合紐約Townhouse標準的鬧市洋房
- [The Monet 龍庭里8號](https://jeffleunghk.com/the-monet.html) — 九龍版Mount Nicholson，私家路唯一性，視覺近但要兜4.5km
- [帝景峰](https://jeffleunghk.com/dynasty-heights.html) — 九龍塘山上老牌豪宅
- [比華利山](https://jeffleunghk.com/beverly-villas.html) — 九龍塘獨立屋群
- [Parc Palais 帝柏園](https://jeffleunghk.com/parc-palais.html) — 九龍塘大型豪宅屋苑
- [One Beacon Hill 壹號畢架山](https://jeffleunghk.com/one-beacon-hill.html)
- [Kadoorie Hill 嘉道理山](https://jeffleunghk.com/kadoorie-hill.html)
- [Grampian Road 金巴倫道](https://jeffleunghk.com/grampian.html)
- [Dragon Court 龍庭](https://jeffleunghk.com/dragon-court.html)
- [Dunbar Place 鄧比徑](https://jeffleunghk.com/dunbar-place.html)
- [Mont Verra 御半山](https://jeffleunghk.com/mont-verra.html)
- [Montebello 蔚山](https://jeffleunghk.com/montebello.html)
- [Parc Inverness 英皇道1號](https://jeffleunghk.com/parc-inverness.html)
- [Parc Regal 帝柏海灣](https://jeffleunghk.com/parc-regal.html)
- [Kadoorie Lookout 嘉道理望](https://jeffleunghk.com/kadoorie-lookout.html)
- [Kadooria 嘉道理道](https://jeffleunghk.com/kadooria.html)
- [Kent Court 根德閣](https://jeffleunghk.com/kent-court.html)
- [Le Chateau 御峰](https://jeffleunghk.com/le-chateau.html)
- [Kowloon Tong Garden 九龍塘花園](https://jeffleunghk.com/kowloon-tong-garden.html)
